rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-based assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree blocks to contain AGREE syntax, with type scopes for constants, equations, and assumptions/guarantees; implementation scopes for assignments.
generic_rules: Ensure all AGREE variables are grounded in visible AADL features or explicit declarations.
Use only AADL-visible identifiers in AGREE expressions to avoid unresolved reference errors.
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections.
Validate that AGREE expressions reference only typed ports or constants exposed in the AADL model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes are for assignments.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level guarantees in component type annexes unless they reference visible ports.
Do not reference subcomponent ports or non-visible identifiers in component type contracts.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
AGREE validator diagnostics and repair actions
Model Analyst agent's structural extraction tasks
